content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Drazil and Date". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/515/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of a single integer n, representing the number of days that have passed since the beginning of the year.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the day of the week (Monday to Sunday) that corresponds to the given number of days.

solution.approach: Calculate the day of the week based on the number of days passed since the beginning of the year, considering that the year starts on a Monday.
